query:
UPDATE media.tv_shows
           SET name           = $2,
               overview       = $3,
               poster_path    = $4,
               first_air_date = $5,
               status         = $6,
               genres         = $7,
               networks       = $8,
               tvmaze_id      = $9,
               backdrop_path  = COALESCE($10, backdrop_path),
               vote_average   = COALESCE(CAST($11::float8 AS numeric(3,1)), vote_average),
               vote_count     = COALESCE($12, vote_count),
               meta_status    = 'ready',
               meta_retries   = 0,
               updated_at     = NOW()
           WHERE id = $1
